title: Friendly Chatbot Tone
scenario: Create a friendly and approachable chatbot persona for a travel booking website. Describe the character's personality, language, and tone. Focus on making the user feel comfortable and supported throughout the booking process. Ensure the persona is 100 words or less.
constraints: Use a friendly and approachable tone

evaluationCriteria.description: Does the persona have a friendly and approachable tone?
Does the persona description adhere to the word limit and tone constraints?
Does the persona use a clear and concise language style?
